The following events took place in '''124 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] approves legislation declaring the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] a free-trade zone exempt from taxation and extending the definition of [[Functional constituency|functional constituencies]] entitled to representation in the Senate to guilds and corporations.<ref name="EA" />
*The [[Treaty of Trammis]] is orchestrated by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Omo Bouri/Legends|Omo Bouri]].<ref name="NEC" />
*The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] is granted [[Senator/Legends|Senatorial]] representation as it becomes a "functional constituency."<ref name="EA" />
